meaning: Q6 How concerned in environmental issues?
question: Generally speaking, how concerned are you about environmental issues? Please tick one box below to indicate what you think, where 1 means you are not at all concerned and 5 means you are very concerned.

meaning: Q7 Most important environmental problem for [COUNTRY] as a whole?
question: Here is a list of some different environmental problems. Which problem, if any, do you think is the most important for [COUNTRY] as a whole?

meaning: Q8 Opinion on climate change and potential causes?
question: There has been a lot of discussion about the world’s climate and the idea it has been changing in recent decades. Which of the following statements comes closest to your opinion?

content.1: The world's climate has not been changing
content.2: The world's climate has been changing mostly due to natural processes
content.3: The world's climate has been changing about equally due to natural processes and human activity
content.4: The world's climate has been changing mostly due to human activity

meaning: Q9a Assessment of impacts on climate change for world?
question: IF NOT CODE 1 IN Q8 'THE WORLD'S CLIMATE HAS NOT BEEN CHANGING' On a scale from 0 to 10, how bad or good do you think the impacts of climate change will be for the WORLD as a whole? 0 means extremely bad, 10 means extremely good.

meaning: Q9b Assessment of impacts on climate change for [COUNTRY]?
question: IF NOT CODE 1 IN Q8 'THE WORLD'S CLIMATE HAS NOT BEEN CHANGING' On a scale from 0 to 10, how bad or good do you think the impacts of climate change will be for [COUNTRY]? 0 means extremely bad, 10 means extremely good.

meaning: Q10a Science will solve environmental problems
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q10a Modern science will solve our environmental problems with little change to our way of life.

meaning: Q10b Worry too much about environment and not enough about prices and jobs
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q10b We worry too much about the future of the environment and not enough about prices and jobs today.

meaning: Q10c Modern life harms the environment
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q10c Almost everything we do in modern life harms the environment.

meaning: Q10d Worry too much about progress harming environment
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q10d People worry too much about human progress harming the environment.

meaning: Q10e [COUNTRY] needs economic growth to protect environment
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q10e In order to protect the environment [COUNTRY] needs economic growth.

meaning: Q10f Economic growth harms environment
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q10f Economic growth always harms the environment.

meaning: Q11a Protect environment: pay much higher prices
question: How willing would you be to pay much higher prices in order to protect the environment?

meaning: Q11b Protect environment: pay much higher taxes
question: And how willing would you be to pay much higher taxes in order to protect the environment?

meaning: Q11c Protect environment: cut your standard of living
question: And how willing would you be to accept cuts in your standard of living in order to protect the environment?

meaning: Q11d Protect environment: accept reduction of protected nature areas for economic development
question: How willing would you be to accept a reduction in the size of [COUNTRY's] protected nature areas, in order to open them up for economic development?

meaning: Q12a Too difficult to do much about environment
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q12a It is just too difficult for someone like me to do much about the environment.

meaning: Q12b I do what is right, even when it costs more money and time
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q12b I do what is right for the environment, even when it costs more money or takes more time.

meaning: Q12c There are more important things than protect environment
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q12c There are more important things to do in life than protect the environment.

meaning: Q12d No point unless others do the same
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q12d There is no point in doing what I can for the environment unless others do the same.

meaning: Q12e Many claims about environment exaggerated
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q12e Many of the claims about environmental threats are exaggerated.

meaning: Q12f Hard to know whether the way I live is helpful or harmful to the environment
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q12f I find it hard to know whether the way I live is helpful or harmful to the environment.

meaning: Q12g Environmental problems have direct effect on everyday life
question: How much do you agree or disagree with each of these statements? Q12g Environmental problems have a direct effect on my everyday life.

meaning: Q13a Air pollution caused by cars is (dangerous/ not dangerous) for environment
question: In general, do you think that air pollution caused by cars is …

content.5: Not dangerous at all for the environment

meaning: Q13b Air pollution caused by industry is (dangerous/ not dangerous) for environment
question: In general, do you think that air pollution caused by industry is …

content.5: Not dangerous at all for the environment

meaning: Q13c Pesticides used in farming are (dangerous/ not dangerous) for environment
question: And do you think that pesticides and chemicals used in farming are …

content.5: Not dangerous at all for the environment

meaning: Q13d Pollution of rivers is (dangerous/ not dangerous) for environment
question: And do you think that pollution of COUNTRY'S rivers, lakes and streams is …

content.5: Not dangerous at all for the environment

meaning: Q13e A rise in world's temperature is (dangerous/ not dangerous) for environment
question: In general, do you think that a rise in the world's temperature caused by climate change is …

content.5: Not dangerous at all for the environment

meaning: Q13f Modifying genes of certain crops is (dangerous/ not dangerous) for environment
question: And do you think that modifying the genes of certain crops is …

content.5: Not dangerous at all for the environment

meaning: Q13g Nuclear power stations are (dangerous/ not dangerous) for environment
question: And do you think that nuclear power stations are …

content.5: Not dangerous at all for the environment

meaning: Q14a Best way: getting business and industry to protect environment
question: Which of these approaches do you think would be the best way of getting business and industry in [COUNTRY] to protect the environment?

content.1: Heavy fines for businesses that damage the environment
content.2: Use the tax system to reward businesses that protect the environment
content.3: More information and education for businesses about the advantages of protecting the environment

meaning: Q14b Best way: getting people and their families to protect environment
question: Which of these approaches do you think would be the best way of getting people and their families in [COUNTRY] to protect the environment?

content.1: Heavy fines for people who damage the environment
content.2: Use the tax system to reward people who protect the environment
content.3: More information and education for people about the advantages of protecting the environment

meaning: Q15 Extent of pleasure being outside in nature?
question: How much, if at all, do you enjoy being outside in nature?

meaning: Q16 Last 12 months: how often engaged in leisure activities outside in nature?
question: In the last twelve months how often, if at all, have you engaged in any leisure activities outside in nature, such as hiking, bird watching, swimming, skiing, other outdoor activities or just relaxing?

meaning: Q17a Last 12 months: number of trips by plane?
question: In the last twelve months, how many trips did you make by plane? Count outward and return journeys, including transfers, as one trip.
